style: .ops-console-root { display: flex; height: 100vh; font-family: system-ui; } .sidebar { width: 200px; background: #2c3e50; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .sidebar button { background: none; border: none; color: #ecf0f1; padding: 10px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 4px; } .sidebar button.active { background: #34495e; } .content-area { flex: 1; overflow: auto; padding: 20px; background: #ecf0f1; } .tab-dashboard, .tab-customers, .tab-tickets, .tab-settings { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .grid-container, .kanban-container, .form-container, .dashboard-container { flex: 1; background: white; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); overflow: hidden; }
